title: Vanilla Fabric
description: Optimized for lower end computers & server performance for sessions with friends, offers a lightly modded vanilla experience
body:
# **VANILLA FABRIC**
**SUPPORT FOR 1.21.1 / 1.21.4 / 1.21.8 / 26.1**


Nothing overbearing, really a relaxing time. **Vanilla** composed with fabric performance & optimization mods optimized for lower end computers and overall pc/server performance, along with quality of life mods to offer a _lightly modded experience_

### **PLEASE PAY ATTENTION**
to which version of the modpack that you choose to download

### **VANILA FABRIC MODLIST**

**v1**
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) c: caffeinemc, jellysquid3, ims
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) c: flashyreese
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) c: caffeinemc, jellysquid3, 2no2name
- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) c: tr7zw
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) c: ralphimc
- [Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) c: malte0811
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) c: squeak502
- [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person) c: socolio
- [NotEnoughAnimations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) c: tr7zw
- [EasyAnvils](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-anvils) & [Shulker Boxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-shulker-boxes) c: fuzs
- [LambsDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) c: lambdaurora
- [FallingTree](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree) c: rakambda
- [BetterClouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds) c: gendolin

- [Diagonal Fences](https://modrinth.com/mod/diagonal-fences) c: fuzs
- [Big Sign Writer](https://modrinth.com/mod/bigsignwriter) c: chililisoup

- ~~[Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) c: mehvahdjukaar~~
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) c: embeddedt (1.21.1)
- [Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments) c: mehvahdjukaar (1.21.1)
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) c: mehvahdjukaar (1.21.1)

**v2**

**CHECK OUT ADJACENT DATAPACKS & RESOURCEPACKS**
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
- [Bee's Fancy Crops](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops) c: bebebea_loste

**NOTE** recommend allocating 2-6GB of VRAM
